channel.title: string on Yuchen's Tech Blog
channel.description: Recent content in string on ych3r.github.io

item.title: Merge Sorted Arrays
item.description: merge two sorted arrays. First I can think of: def merge_sorted_arrays(arr1: int, arr2: int) -> int: # [0, 3, 4, 31] [4, 6, 30] return …

item.title: Reverse A String
item.description: Create a function that reverses a string. The first one I can think of: def reverse(string: str) -> str: return string[::-1] Let’s see the …
